spec.globalPrompt: Create one photorealistic cinematic 16:9 scene image for a modern web novel. Keep the style consistent with the title, character, and talk-level background prompts. Use realistic anatomy, realistic materials, and live-action-like lighting.
spec.globalNegativePrompt: anime, manga, cel shading, cartoon, text, logo, watermark, collage, split panel, multiple moments in one frame, deformed anatomy
spec.promptSuffix: Use the installment-specific Sato portrait for Sato. Use Sera's canonical portrait directly without redesigning her for this installment. Sera never carries knives or other bladed weapons; if she uses a tool, keep it small, discreet, and non-bladed. For Sato-side images, Sato is dominant and any Sera presence must stay clearly separate and unreadable as a casual companion. For Sera-side images, Sera is dominant, the attacker must not resemble Sato, and Sato must remain an unaware background figure looking elsewhere. Preserve the feeling of a refined but ordinary Sunday, and compose for a 1920x1080 delivery with the main subjects near the center and safe margins on both sides so the image also works in portrait scrolling layouts.

characters.name: サトー
characters.visualRules: Keep him consistent with the episode-specific portrait generated from the canonical Sato image.

characters.name: セラ
characters.visualRules: Keep her consistent with the canonical Sera portrait, including the visible cat-ear support-security unit, without adding installment-specific redesign. The support unit is completed by the cat-ear headband alone, so do not add backpack rigs, back-mounted devices, extra mechanical arms, exoskeleton parts, visible cable bundles, or any other extra machinery. Do not give her knives, daggers, swords, blades, or any other bladed weapon.

continuityNotes: Sera's support unit must be only the cat-ear headband visible on her head.
Do not attach any extra machinery to her back, shoulders, waist, or limbs.
scene-001-001-002-sera.negativePrompt: No backpack rig, no back-mounted machine, no extra mechanical arms, no exoskeleton, no visible cable bundle, no sci-fi harness, no drone attachment.

continuityNotes: Sera must not carry or display any knife, dagger, blade, sword, or other bladed weapon.
If a tool is visible, it must be a small non-bladed utility tool only.
Sera must be the clear foreground subject of the image.
Sato may appear only as a small, unaware background figure or be omitted entirely.
scene-002-002-002-sera.negativePrompt: No knife, no dagger, no blade, no sword, no box cutter, no scalpel, no bladed weapon, no stabbing pose, no Sato-centered composition, no male foreground lead, no scene where Sera is background only.
scene-002-002-002-sera.promptSuffix: Make Sera the unmistakable visual protagonist in the foreground or midground. Sato must not dominate the frame.
